_comment: TEMPLATE — copy to _local/ads-strategy/strategy.json and replace every <placeholder>. The real file is operator-specific and gitignored (never commit it). fill_campaign_structure.py refuses to run while any '<' placeholder remains. Numbers here are METHODOLOGY — keep them out of tracked files.
refreshed_from_notion: <YYYY-MM-DD — when these values were last checked against your strategy source>

sv_bands._comment: Search-volume bands per bucket. severity 'warn' reports but allows; 'fail' blocks the apply.

rank_skw.min: <int, e.g. lower SV bound for single-keyword rank campaigns>

halo.max: <int — keywords at or above this SV do not belong in halo campaigns>

phase1._comment: launch phase-1 target count and SV window; echoed to the agent, not enforced

discovery.min_root_words: <int — roots with fewer words trigger a specificity WARN>

expanded_candidate_filter._comment: Bounds which Expanded-MKL rows become halo candidates, to keep candidates.json readable.

bids._comment: Visual plan only — rendered into the Proposed Campaign Names block, never pushed anywhere. start_bid_pct_of_recommended: your launch rule as a signed percent (e.g. -30 = start 30% below the recommended/suggested bid; applied to the MKL 'Sugg. bid & range' value when present, otherwise shown as a rule). Placement modifiers are percents (0 = none). Mirrors the bulk-creator webapp default_settings fields.

naming._comment: Mirrors the bulk-creator webapp NamingSettings 1:1 so proposed names in the workbook match what the webapp generates. Copy your webapp settings here. 'suffix' is your agency/operator marker (the 'EW' naming variable renders this value).

by_bucket._comment: ctx per bucket for name generation. descriptor placeholders: {keyword} {root} {counter}. goal values must be Discovery|Rank|Profit; match_type EXACT|BROAD|PHRASE|ASIN_EXACT; campaign_type SKW|Halo|BMM|Phrase|PAT.
